message: 🌱 Add sops: Configurable indentation for yaml output in .sops.yaml mission (#714)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "sops-900-configurable-indentation-for-yaml-output-in-sops-yaml",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "sops: Configurable indentation for yaml output in .sops.yaml",
+    "description": "Configurable indentation for yaml output in .sops.yaml. Requested by 64+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current sops deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your sops version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n sops -l app.kubernetes.io/name=sops\nhelm list -n sops 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working sops installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review sops configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant sops configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n sops -l app.kubernetes.io/name=sops\nkubectl get configmap -n sops -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=sops\n```\nIt would be great if we could configure our indentation for yaml in the .sops.yaml configuration file. Right now it's just hardcoded to set the indent to 4 all the time."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Configurable indentation for yaml output in .sops.yaml",
+        "description": "this will allow for setting of parameters specific to each store, such as indentation level for YAML (https://github.com/mozilla/sops/issues/900).\n```yaml\nyq e -P somefile.yml > somefile.fixed.yml\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n sops -l app.kubernetes.io/name=sops\nkubectl get events -n sops --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Configurable indentation for yaml output in .sops.yaml\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "this will allow for setting of parameters specific to each store, such as indentation level for YAML (https://github.com/mozilla/sops/issues/900).",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "yq e -P somefile.yml > somefile.fixed.yml"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "sops",
